Tomato_Early_blight.name: Early Blight
Tomato_Early_blight.advice: Remove affected leaves, use fungicide spray, ensure proper spacing.

Tomato_Late_blight.name: Late Blight
Tomato_Late_blight.advice: Apply fungicides, avoid overhead watering, remove infected plants.

Tomato_Leaf_Mold.name: Leaf Mold
Tomato_Leaf_Mold.advice: Ensure good airflow, avoid wetting leaves, remove infected leaves.

Tomato_healthy.name: Healthy
Tomato_healthy.advice: Plant is healthy. Continue regular care.
